page.content: In the pursuit of understanding the demographic and health-related characteristics of the sample population, a comprehensive analysis of various investigated variables was conducted. The data table presents a summary of the basic biological data collected from 42 distinct items, encompassing a wide array of metrics.

lines.text: In the pursuit of understanding the demographic and health-related characteristics of the sample population, a comprehensive
analysis of various investigated variables was conducted. The data table presents a summary of the basic biological data
collected from 42 distinct items, encompassing a wide array of metrics.

page.html:
Items (N = 42)Investigated variables (N = 392)Used variables (N = 46)
Basic biological data8Gender, age, educational and vocational history, approval for long-term care insurance (if available), body height and weight75
Living environment2Family structure, condition of house81
Health status5Cognitions, mood, visual and auditory problems, need for walking aids258
Medical history and comorbidity3Past medical history and comorbidities, medication history423
Locomotive organ problems4Complaints, diagnosis for locomotive organ diseases, method of treatment, medical history including fractures or falls653
Physical findings4Area of pain (back pain, buttock pain, thigh pain, knee pain), posture classification, neurological signs198
Laboratory tests5Serum vitamin D, hyaluronic acid, bone mineral density33
X-rays2Semiquantitative X-ray findings related to the spine and knee1592
Motor functional assessment8Muscle strength, range of motion of hip and knee joints, one-leg standing time, 100-step test, grip strength, lower limb extension power, forward bending, grades of independence3912
GLFS-25 score125 items251

Complaints, diagnosis for locomotive organ diseases, method of treatment, medical history including fractures or falls
Area of pain (back pain, buttock pain, thigh pain, knee pain), posture classification, neurological signs

page.content:
Notably, the investigated variables total 392, reflecting the extensive range of factors considered in this study, which include gender, age, and educational and vocational history. Such diversity in data points is essential for constructing a nuanced understanding of the population's profile. 

Moreover, the table highlights the utilized variables, totaling 46, which provide critical insights into the relationship between individual characteristics and their potential eligibility for long-term care insurance. This information is particularly relevant given the increasing importance of aging populations and the associated healthcare needs. As the study progresses, these foundational metrics will serve as a basis for further analysis, enabling researchers to draw meaningful conclusions regarding the interplay between demographic factors and health outcomes. The data collected not only enhances our understanding of the cohort but also informs policy implications for long-term care planning and resource allocation.
